## Checklist

- [ ] I read the agent I modified before making changes
- [ ] Changes follow the existing structure and tone of the agent
- [ ] Swift Evolution proposals are cited where applicable (e.g., SE-0466)
- [ ] I tested the change by invoking the agent with a relevant prompt
- [ ] One concern per PR (not mixing unrelated changes)
